refinement_sections.content: We need to sort a big list of customer info, like names, emails, and phone numbers, so we can find stuff easily
It should use less memory and work fast even when lots of people are using it at the same time
We have to search by name, email, and phone number, and we need to update the list a lot
Make it efficient, I guess, so it doesn't take too long to sort and search
I assume the customer records are like, in a database or something, and we can use a computer to do the sorting
